urdu transliteration text: HUSSAIN (A.S.) WALE HAI ZINDA, HUSSAIN TERE LIYE
english translation text:
The people of Hussain (a.s) are alive
Just for you Hussain (a.s)
They have been sent by Batool (s.a)

urdu transliteration text: DUAEN RATON KO KARTE THE ISLIYE HAIDER YEH RAZ KARBOBALA ME AYAAN HUA SAB PAR
english translation text:
Haider (a.s) would pray at night for this
The secret was unveiled to everyone in Kerbala

urdu transliteration text: ALI NE MAANGA THA BETA HUSSAIN TERE LIYE
english translation text: Ali (a.s) had asked for a son, just for you Hussain

urdu transliteration text: ALI TO AAYE THE QIBLA USSE BANANE KO SIYAAH POSHI BATATI HAI YEH ZAMANE KO
english translation text:
Ali had come to make it a Qibla
The black cloth on it tells the entire world…
In actual fact, the Ka’abah was made

urdu transliteration text: TERE BAGAIR NAHI LAGTA DIL PAYAMBAR KABATA RAHA HAI HUM KO ZUHOOR AKBAR (A.S.) KA
english translation text:
Without you, the Prophet’s heart is not at ease
The birth of Ali Akbar tells us that

urdu transliteration text:
RASOOL AAYE DOBARA
The Prophet has come back again
UTHENGE TAAZIE WADA HAI SAR RAHE NA RAHE GHAME HUSSAIN (A.S.) RAHE GA PISAR RAHE NA RAHE
english translation text:
We will continue this azadari, whether our heads remain or not
The lamentation on hussain (a.s) will continue, whether our sons remain or not

urdu transliteration text:
JULOOS CHALTA RAHEGA
Processions will continue
HAR EK SHAHEED KE LAB PE YAHI TARANA HAI QAZA TO TUJHSE MULAKAT KA BAHANA HAI
english translation text:
All martyrs have the same slogan on their lips
Death is just an excuse to meet with you

urdu transliteration text: MAI BAAR BAAR MARUNGA HUSSAIN TERE LIYE
english translation text:
I am ready to die over and over
Just for you Hussain (a.s)…
